detailedDescription:
The entry point to RTX gaming.
6GB of GDDR6 with real-time ray tracing and DLSS support at 1080p.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: TU106 | Architecture: Turing
CUDA Cores: 1920 | RT Cores: 30 | Tensor Cores: 240
VRAM: 6GB GDDR6 (192-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 336 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.0, 1x USB-C (VirtualLink)
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 3.0)
Recommended PSU: 550W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
